creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
Created attachment 209999
The poudriere build log

FreeBSD scorpio.seibercom.net 11.3-RELEASE-p5 FreeBSD 11.3-RELEASE-p5 #0: Tue Nov 12 08:59:04 UTC 2019     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

The port does not build under poudriere. I have tried it several times. Because of this, poudriere is refusing to build other ports that depend on it. The poudriere build log is attached.
